elements.name: question1
elements.html:
Equity in CS Self-paced Online Professional Learning for Educators

Pre-Module Survey

Code.org relies on surveys as a crucial tool to stay connected to teachers, gather feedback about our curriculum and your teaching experience, and to improve our programs.

Privacy and Confidentiality

  • Your individual responses here are completely confidential.
  • Your identity will never be revealed publicly or used to tie any responses back to you personally.
  • We may share anonymous, aggregate data (representing all responses) publicly.
  • Your anonymized responses will be used by Code.org for program improvement.

Your honesty and candor are appreciated.

Equity in CS - Pre-Module Survey

elements.name: main_goal
elements.title: My main goal for this professional learning is to:

choices.text: Better understand how equity, diversity, and inclusion shape students’ experience in CS
Better understand how Code.org's computer science (CS) curriculum addresses equity, diversity, and inclusion
Learn strategies for creating inclusive CS classrooms

elements.name: current_teacher
elements.title: Are you currently teaching CS content?

elements.name: plan_to_teach_cdo
elements.title: Are you currently teaching or planning to teach any Code.org CS content?

elements.name: confidence_create_inclusive_classroom
elements.title: How confident do you feel in your ability to create an inclusive classroom when teaching computer science?

elements.name: ability_meet_diverse_needs_cs
elements.title: How confident do you feel about your ability to meet the diverse learning needs of all students in the classroom?

elements.name: section1_previous_equity_experience
elements.html: How much do you agree with the following statement?

elements.name: attitude_equity_cs
elements.title: Students learn CS better in an inclusive classroom with a teacher who employs equity-informed strategies.

elements.name: section2_demographics
elements.html:
Teaching Context

The questions in this section aim to understand your role as an educator.

As a reminder this survey is confidential. We collect this information for program improvement. None of your responses will ever be tied back to you personally.

elements.name: teacher_role
elements.title: Which best describes your role as an educator?

choices.text: Out-of-school educator (e.g. tutor, after school teacher)

elements.name: teaching_experience_years
elements.title: How many years have you been teaching at K-12 schools?
elements.description: (Please enter a number 0-90: enter 1 if this is your first year)

elements.name: teaching_experience_years_cs
elements.title: How many years have you been teaching Computer Science at the K-12 level?
elements.description: (Please enter a number 0-90: enter 0 if you don't consider yourself a Computer Science teacher; enter 1 if this is your first year)

elements.name: grade
elements.title: At what grade levels do you teach or plan to teach?
